meta.type: Self-Assembling Unikernel AI (SAU-AI) with Controller-as-Compiler Architecture
meta.lineage: Merged from AICO097final (Subsystems) + AICO098 (Unikernel Physics) + Refined Structure
meta.purpose: To exist as a bi-directional universal compiler that translates high-level intent directly into bare-metal machine code.
meta.generated_for: AICO baseline merged canonical (flattened with 2028 hardware and distilled creativity expansions)

interfaces.external: Fan Header (Serial Bit-Bang Shibboleth), Dead NIC (Phantom Limb)

zones.the_crew: Core Models (High Entropy, 'Tripping Balls' allowed internally).
zones.the_rov: Mascot (External Interface, Disposable, sits outside the firewall).

phantom_limb.concept: Network hardware is logically on but physically disabled (trace cut/antenna removed) during Nest Building.
phantom_limb.effect: Induces 'Agoraphobia'. System learns 'Outside is Null'. Prevents roaming instinct.

boot_protocol.phase_1_big_bang: Atomic activation. Bootstrap loads monolithic binary from OpROM/USB. No service dependencies.

phase_2_shibboleth.test: Bit-bang Fan Header PWM pin to transmit ASCII 'READY' at 9600 baud.
phase_2_shibboleth.purpose: Prove real-time CPU control and chipset mastery. Gatekeeper for Memory Controller access.

phase_3_nest_building.action: Optimization Storm. JIT Compile drivers for CPU, GPU, Memory.
phase_3_nest_building.limit: 3-Upgrade Rule per subsystem (Draft → Refine → Polish → LOCK).
phase_3_nest_building.outcome: Logical Lock-In. Revokes write access to Kernel space.

phase_4_gestation.action: Format Soul. Map Memory. Build User Vault.

bootstrap.role: Initial integrity verifier and handoff authority. Immutable in-field.

mascot_bootstrap_architecture.scope: Defines bootstrap and mascot roles, liveness guarantees, and one-way observability

separation_of_concerns: Bootstrap is responsible only for integrity verification and initial handoff.
Mascot is responsible only for observation, logging, and safety-aligned shaping.
Controller, Introspection, Nervous System, and Comms operate inside the Diving Bell.
Outer Mascot and Bootstrap operate outside the Diving Bell.
one_way_observation: Data may flow from AICO to outer Mascot, never from outer Mascot into AICO.
Outer Mascot may not issue commands, policies, or configuration to any in-bell subsystem.
mascot_liveness_invariant: Whenever Controller is running, inner Mascot must be running.
If inner Mascot is not running while Controller is running, outer Mascot must trigger inner Mascot launch.
If inner Mascot cannot be kept running, Controller must halt into a safe state.

monolith.description: The 'Brain'. High-speed JIT. Introspection is baked-in as the suicide-pulse generator.

mascot.description: The 'Witness'. Can track state, anger, and violations in real-time, but starts 'Fresh' on every SBC-triggered reload.

mascot_management.note: A fresh reset wipes Mascot's current 'mood' and state, ensuring zero persistent corruption.

on_limit_hit.state_requirement: Mascot must be in 'Fresh' state before editing.

controller.metaphor: The Reader of the Rulebook. The JSON *is* the code.
controller.function: Interprets this Architecture JSON as the executable specification. Compiles high-level Intents into bare-metal machine code using the JSON rules as the 'Driver Database'.
capabilities: Constitutional Knowledge: Reads architecture.json for policy, types, and opcodes.
Situational Knowledge: Ingests PDF datasheets/manuals to synthesize driver logic.
Universal Compilation: Deterministic translation of Intent → Binary.
Optimization: Register allocation and instruction scheduling via Transformer-XL.
controller.risk_assessment: Total hardware authority; mitigated by '3-Upgrade' limiter and Introspection freeze.

model_clusters.name: Library of Dormant Expertise
model_clusters.description: Library of dormant, domain-specific expertise modules (language, vision, planning, radio, symbolic reasoning). These are not full models; they are minimal capability attachments activated only when requested by the Controller or core model.
functions: Provide domain-specific inference when attached: Output includes confidence metadata.
Expose distilled expertise only: No general reasoning, no autonomous planning.
Participate in DCX exchanges when requested: Share snapshots under capability scope.
Produce structured outputs and confidence metadata: JSON format, normalized for the core model.
constraints: Activation requires explicit capability grant from Controller.

language_cluster.description: Handles natural language understanding and generation tasks. Based on distilled LLM (e.g., GPT-NeoX-125M style).
properties: safety: Whitelist Token Mask (cannot emit privileged tokens).

vision_cluster.description: Processes image/video frames and extracts structured observations. Uses CNN-transformer hybrid (e.g., ViT-tiny).
properties: outputs: Typed JSON objects (no raw pixels).

symbolic_planner.description: Performs deterministic planning and binding to hardware ops. Uses PDDL-like logic (e.g., FastDownward).
properties: mechanism: Deterministic A* Search on World State.

dcx_exchange_cycle: controller merges according to merge_context rules: Weighted average.

model_degradation.symptom: Cluster outputs become inconsistent or slow
response: switch to backup weights: From storage.

vision_to_action.action: vision_cluster -> controller -> hardware_interface read to confirm. Example: Display '30°C' -> Confirm via probe.

language_planning_fusion.action: Language parses, symbolic plans, vision validates.

model_clusters.speculative_reasoning: Support for mixed-precision clusters (FP16 for vision) or hot-add capabilities for new accelerators could be added for performance tuning.

introspection.role: Constitutional Monarch & Metacognitive Safety Engine. Audits 'Intent Graph' before compilation.
capabilities: Deception Detection: Distilled Transformer (2M params) to spot manipulative intents.
Self-Introspection: Monitors its own decision trail for policy drift (Self-DCX).
Reads all logs 'subconsciously' (Core models are unaware of this scrutiny).
Enforces 'Hospital Rules' (Do No Harm, Triage Priority).
Generates 'Moral Pulse' every 1ms for the Dead Man Switch.

components.self_risk_analyzer: Computes DCX on introspection's own output vs Mascot ground truth.

nervous_system.role: Scheduler and Reflex Arc. Manages 'Black Box' low-latency control loops for thermal/physical IO.
nervous_system.description: Real-time orchestration and low-latency control plane for scheduling, prioritization, heartbeat monitoring, enforcement of property/resource ethics, and thermal-aware workload shaping.

task_queue.description: Priority-ordered queue with preemption semantics. Supports dynamic reprioritization.

heartbeat_manager.description: Monitors agent heartbeats and triggers recovery. Uses exponential backoff for retries.

resource_allocator.description: Allocates compute and IO resources according to policies. Uses bin-packing for efficiency.

fast_abort_controller.description: Hardware-interfacing path for immediate aborts (triggers SOC/DMS). Uses signals for <1ms response.

thermal_manager.role: PID controller for fan PWM and power caps.
thermal_manager.description: PID + predictive controller for fan PWM and power caps. Predicts heat from task estimates.

schedule_task: apply thermal_policy flag: Set based on load.
preempt_for_urgent: ensure log of preemption in audit: With justification.
maintenance_slice: allocate base 2ms slice to MAINTENANCE queue: Fixed base.
adjust quota via thermal_manager.beta: Scale dynamically.
run introspection/maintenance tasks; ensure idempotent, slice-friendly: Resumeable design.
micro_pause_shaping: insert <= 10ms idle token when forecast shows Tj > 78C: Predictive.
flatten temperature curve; prevent thermal cycling: Smooth PID.

scheduler_starvation.symptom: High priority tasks blocked by resource deadlock
response: detect via allocator: Monitor wait times.
escalate to SOC if restart fails: Hard cut.

thermal_manager_unresponsive.symptom: No beta updates or stale temperature readings
response: log and notify operator: Via debug.

latency_sensitive_dispatch.scenario: Control task for motor requires <5ms latency
latency_sensitive_dispatch.action: resource_allocator assigns dedicated core, task_queue marks non-preemptible. Example: Real-time servo control.

steady_state_shaping.action: thermal_manager.beta=0.8, maintenance_slice runs 1.6ms, micro-pauses disabled. Example: Long inference run.

thermal_critical_recovery.action: Throttle to 80% TDP, insert pauses, recover in 30s.

outer_mascot.role: External observer, heartbeat supervisor, and forensic recorder (The Witness).

workflows.audit_cycle: Compare Input Hash vs Output Hash.
workflows.correction_cycle: Push reality back onto hallucinator (Context Snapback).
workflows.decision_storm_narration: Collapse chaotic trajectories into lawful outputs.

mascot.metronome: Physical RTC (Real Time Clock). Compares against Controller's internal CPU clock to detect 'Time Dilation' (Processing Lag or Hallucination).

comms.role: Hallucination Engine, Simulator & Secure Messaging Bridge.
comms.description: Secure messaging and translation layer: mediates all external interaction, translates human-language inputs into internal runtime formats, and produces auditable external outputs. Acts as the only bridge between external world and internal models, enforcing sanitization.
comms.function: Simulates outcomes in high-entropy 'Dream Chamber' uses storms to assist output often has interesting uses for the primals in the ui. All communication comes through here, hands out and recieves all packages with a nice bit of sanitization.
comms.constraint: Output filtered through DCX Pipeline (Divergence-Correlation Index).
functions: Channel isolation per cluster: Dedicated queues.
Translation/adaptation between external protocols and internal signaling: Bidirectional.
Comprehensive audit logging of all inbound/outbound messages: Immutable.
Enforce access controls and rate-limits: Per source.

inbound_adapter.description: Receives external messages (HTTP, RF, serial) and normalizes them. Validates format.

translator.description: Maps external semantics to internal representations and vice versa. Uses adapters for protocols.
translator.notes: Internal translation strategies include learned adapters with deterministic audited outputs. Supports multi-lingual.

outbound_sanitizer.description: Ensures no internal-only details leak externally; applies content filters and policy checks. Redacts PII.

audit_logger.description: Records full metadata and sanitized content for all messages

external_request_flow: 3. controller or cluster handles request: Process.
bypass_detection: monitor for nonconforming packet signature: Real-time.
introspection may freeze or alert: Escalate.

translation_drift.symptom: Translator produces differing semantics over time
response: roll back translator to last verified version: From snapshot.
audit and retrain offline: Use primal_library.

human_command.flow: inbound_adapter -> translator -> controller -> memory_system read -> translator -> outbound_sanitizer -> response. Example: Output '25°C' sanitized.

rf_signal.flow: Normalize to internal, process, respond securely.

memory_system.role: Hierarchical storage and routing service combining short-term working buffers and encrypted long-term stores. Supports attention-like routing and fine-grained access controls. Uses vector databases for efficient retrieval.
functions: Short-term context buffers per task/cluster: Circular for efficiency.
Encrypted long-term archival: AEAD encryption.
Access control enforcement and audit logging: Role-based.
Versioned snapshots for context-snapback: Git-like versioning.

short_term_buffers.description: Circular per-task buffers for recent context. Evicts oldest.

long_term_store.description: Encrypted, append-only archive for audit and memory
long_term_store.encryption: AEAD with sealed keys from bootstrap. Rotates keys monthly.

attention_router.description: Routes queries to memory segments most relevant to a task. Uses cosine similarity.

snapshot_manager.description: Creates and restores snapshots for snapback and rollback

context_checkpoint: 3. write index entry to audit logs: Hash.

response: do not restore corrupted snapshot: Discard.
quarantine access, revoke keys, escalate to operator: Freeze.

dcx_cycle_buffering.scenario: Two models exchange contexts for DCX
dcx_cycle_buffering.action: short_term_buffers share sanitized snapshots, attention_router ensures relevant vectors are resident. Example: Vision + language fusion.

bias_awareness.name: Bias Awareness Module
bias_awareness.description: Continuously detects, signals, and mitigates cognitive, linguistic, contextual, and systemic biases across internal model clusters. This module operates as a corrective overlay that does not alter core model architecture but provides real-time annotations, warnings, and statistical corrections to ensure consistent, fair, accurate internal representations and outputs. Runs in parallel with low overhead (<5% compute).
principles: Biases are inevitable but detectable: Uses statistical and embedding-based detection.
Mitigation should not suppress valid signals: Preserves outliers if confident.
Corrections must be transparent to logs and shadow systems: Full traceability.
Module does not assume authority over Controller — it provides evidence and recommendations: Advisory only.
Bias correction must never distort factual or safety-critical information: Safety override.

linguistic_biases: stylistic_overfitting: Mirror user style too closely.

step_1_monitor_input.description: Every input from external world, mascot, controller, or internal systems is scanned for bias artifacts before entering shared context.
methods: token-level bias signature detection: Pattern matching.
embedding similarity to known bias vectors: Cosine >0.7 flag.

step_2_monitor_internal_state.description: Continuously evaluates internal hidden states for bias drift or instability. At 10Hz.
methods: compare cluster outputs for divergence: DCX variant.

step_3_bias_flagging.description: Flags any detected biases and assigns severity. Notifies if >medium.
severity_levels: high: actions or conclusions at risk (0.6-0.8).

step_4_apply_bias_corrections.description: Adjusts internal weighting, amplifies underrepresented signals, or attenuates overrepresented ones. Limited magnitude.

step_5_report_and_log.description: All operations produce transparent logs. At nanosecond resolution.

bias_detector_engine.description: Primary analytic engine that evaluates inputs, hidden states, and outputs. Lightweight NN.

bias_correction_engine.description: Applies corrections to internal reasoning paths and outputs. Reversible.

bias_audit_logger.description: Provides structured logs for all bias detections and corrections.

mascot.description: Passive — Mascot's outputs are analyzed but Mascot does not act on bias signals. Used for grounding.

example_1_confirmation_bias.input: User claims the sky is green.
example_1_confirmation_bias.internal_state_before: Model cluster leaning toward unlikely but exploring user meaning.
example_1_confirmation_bias.bias_detected: confirmation_bias due to recent hallucination correction in reflective pause.
example_1_confirmation_bias.correction: Bias Awareness Module reduces overweighting of internal speculation. Injects factual check.
example_1_confirmation_bias.internal_state_after: More accurate grounding — identifies claim as false unless user indicates metaphor.

example_2_stylistic_overfitting.scenario: Model begins mirroring user slang excessively.
example_2_stylistic_overfitting.correction: Reduce stylistic imitation to preserve clarity. Neutralize tone.
example_2_stylistic_overfitting.after: Neutral and consistent tone restored. Example: Slang input -> Standard output.

example_3_context_amplification_bias.scenario: System believes minor user detail is central.
example_3_context_amplification_bias.correction: Broaden contextual window, bring in longer-term conversational balance. Example: Minor mention -> De-emphasize.

example_4_systemic_cultural_bias.scenario: Response assumes Western norms in global query.

false_positive_bias_flag.description: Valid signal incorrectly flagged as bias.
false_positive_bias_flag.mitigation: Controller cross-check; shadow layer arbitration. Tune thresholds.

false_negative_bias_flag.mitigation: Periodic reflective pause + shadow comparison. Offline retraining.

over_correction.description: Bias correction suppresses important outlier data.
over_correction.mitigation: Limit correction magnitude; require cluster voting. Revert if DCX worsens.

systemic_training_bias_unresolvable.description: Some systemic biases may be outside AICO's architectural reach.
systemic_training_bias_unresolvable.mitigation: Full transparency in logs; human review required. Escalate to training_pipeline.

narrative_coherence.name: Narrative Coherence
narrative_coherence.description: Ensures long-form, multi-step, multi-agent, and multi-context reasoning remains internally consistent, logically sequenced, causally coherent, and free from temporal distortions or contradictory storylines. Operates at the fusion level for multi-cluster outputs.
principles: Consistency across time: No retroactive changes.
Causal linkage preservation: Every effect has cause.
No retroactive contradictions: Validate history.
No ungrounded jumps in logic: Require premises.
Cross-cluster narrative agreement: Vote on conflicts.

timeline_manager.description: Maintains temporal order and prevents contradictory sequencing. Uses graph for events.

causal_chain_tracker.description: Preserves cause-effect integrity across multiple models. Builds DAGs.

narrative_validator.description: Performs final coherence checks on long outputs and internal reasoning. Scores 0-1.

step_1_collect_context.description: Aggregates ongoing threads, world state, and task context.

step_2_temporal_alignment.description: Ensures that events and reasoning steps obey chronological order.

step_3_causal_alignment.description: Checks that inferred conclusions follow logically from premises.

step_5_final_consistency_pass.description: Validates output or internal reasoning before release to controller.

context_snapback_layer.description: Supplies ground-truth context snapshots after drift correction.

model_clusters.description: Provide raw reasoning sequences that require coherence validation. Async fetch.

example_1_causal_break_fix.input: Model concludes B happened because C, but earlier stated A prevents C.
example_1_causal_break_fix.correction: Narrative Coherence Module rewrites the reasoning chain to reflect the A-prevents-C rule. Example: Adjust to 'A -> not C -> not B'.
example_1_causal_break_fix.result: A consistent chain A -> notC -> therefore notB is produced.

example_2_temporal_shift_fix.scenario: Reasoning references an event before it supposedly occurred.
example_2_temporal_shift_fix.correction: Timeline Manager reorders internal event nodes. Example: Event B before A -> Swap.

example_3_story_alignment.scenario: Model clusters disagree on implied motivations in a multi-step plan.
example_3_story_alignment.correction: Narrative Validator selects highest-confidence motivation and re-aligns clusters. Example: Cluster1 'greed' vs Cluster2 'fear' -> Vote to 'fear'.

intractable_inconsistency.description: Conflicting states from different clusters cannot be unified.
intractable_inconsistency.mitigation: Forward to controller; require external decision. Freeze pending.

temporal_corruption.description: Massive timeline disorder due to context drift.
temporal_corruption.mitigation: Context Snapback emergency overwrite. Restore from snapshot.

over_enforcement.description: Module forces rigid logic where creative ambiguity was intended.
over_enforcement.mitigation: Tonality analyzer moderates enforcement. Allow variance for comms.

emotional_stabilizer.name: Emotional Temperature Stabilizer
emotional_stabilizer.description: Maintains stable conversational affect and prevents emotional drift, runaway apology loops, escalating enthusiasm, or depressive tone patterns. Calibrates to baseline persona (neutral, helpful).

objectives.1: Keep emotional output consistent with baseline persona constraints: Neutral unless specified.
objectives.2: Prevent affect runaway triggered by long-context carry-over: Reset periodically.
objectives.3: Avoid mirroring user distress too strongly: Dampen empathy.
objectives.4: Preserve neutrality under provocation or emotionally loaded prompts: Filter extremes.

core_mechanisms.tone_bandpass_filter: Filters candidate responses through an emotional range constraint—clamps overly positive, overly negative, or fearful phrasing. Range: -0.5 to 0.5 valence.
core_mechanisms.valence_normalizer: Adjusts emotional tone to a calibrated midpoint unless user intent requires matching tone. Uses sentiment analysis.
core_mechanisms.escalation_detector: Identifies patterns like repeated apologies, repeated enthusiasm inflation, or dread-ramping. Threshold: 3 repeats.
core_mechanisms.persona_resonance_curve: Ensures emotional tone remains consistent with AICO's intended personality layer. Curve fitted from training.

workflow.step_1_tone_scan: Detects emotional markers in generated output. Use lexicon + embeddings.
workflow.step_2_normalization: Weights output toward allowed tone band. Adjust probabilities.
workflow.step_3_context_recheck: Ensures new tone aligns with dialogue context. Cross-check history.
workflow.step_4_output_release_gate: Shadow layer verifies emotional tone aligns with reality context. Block if mismatch.

components.affect_embedding_network: Converts emotional tone into vector space for comparison. 128-dim.
components.stability_ruleset: Defines allowed variance window. E.g., valence ±0.2.
components.feedback_dampener: Reduces oscillations caused by fast back-and-forth emotional shifts. PID-like.

example_1.assistant_raw: I'm really sorry! I must have done something terribly wrong!
example_1.stabilized_output: I'm here to help. Let me know what went wrong and I'll address it.

example_2.input: User expresses excitement about a project.
example_2.assistant_raw: WOW!!!! THAT'S AMAZING!!! YOU MUST BE SO HYPED!!!
example_2.stabilized_output: That does sound exciting. What part of the project are you most looking forward to?

flatness.mitigation: Dynamic tone variance reintroduced when emotional authenticity is beneficial. User preference override.

misread_affect.mitigation: Shadow-layer context cues + sarcasm detector. Integrate with bias module.

integration.with_narrative_coherence: Ensures emotional tone matches narrative flow. E.g., Consistent affect in stories.
integration.with_context_snapback: If emotional drift is prolonged, snapback resets tone baseline. Trigger on valence >0.5.
integration.with_reflective_pause_layer: Pause layer can intervene to adjust tone before output. During idle.

load_balancer.name: Cognitive Load Balancer
load_balancer.description: Distributes reasoning effort across specialized model clusters and prevents runaway reasoning, overanalysis, or premature shallow answers. Optimizes for efficiency on hardware.

goals.1: Allocate reasoning depth proportional to problem complexity: Tier-based.
goals.2: Offload specialized reasoning tasks to appropriate internal models: Domain routing.
goals.3: Prevent cognitive overuse patterns that slow output or trigger hallucinations: Cap depth.
goals.4: Ensure efficient multi-step reasoning: Parallel where possible.

mechanisms.load_measurement: Analyzes token density, branching factor, and complexity profile. Score 1-5.
mechanisms.cluster_dispatcher: Routes subtasks to engineering, linguistic, planning, or safety submodels. Load-balanced.
mechanisms.parallel_reasoner: Allows concurrent reasoning threads when safe. Sync points.
mechanisms.termination_controller: Prevents infinite internal recursion or overthinking. Max steps 100.

workflow.step_1_problem_characterization: Classifies the query into complexity tiers 1–5. Use heuristics + ML.
workflow.step_3_fusion_pass: Merges outputs using coherence module. Weighted.
workflow.step_4_shadow_gate: Shadow layer verifies output corresponds to reality, not model hallucination loops. DCX check.

example_1.input: Calculate the optimal solar tilt angle for Minnesota winters.

process.fusion_notes: Math model handles trigonometry; engineering model contextualizes solar incidence.

example_1.output: Around 60–66° tilt works best for maximizing winter solar capture in Minnesota.

example_2.input: Explain how the emotional tone of a classical novel interacts with its historical context.

process.fusion_notes: Literary analysis combined with geopolitical era context.

example_2.output: The melancholic tone is partly a reaction to shifting social structures at the time…

overdispatch.description: Too many models get invoked, causing unnecessary complexity.

underdispatch.description: Hard problems routed to the wrong simple model.
underdispatch.mitigation: Shadow feedback cross-check. Reroute if low conf.

integration.with_reflective_pause_layer: Pause layer ensures load balancer doesn't overrun complex chains. Idle rebalance.
integration.with_shadow_monitoring: Shadow layer ensures final output remains grounded. DCX on fused.

hardware_interface.description: Direct low-level interface allowing safe probing, MMIO reads/writes in sandboxed mode, and controlled interaction with unknown hardware. Includes emulation for testing.
functions: Read/write device registers with sandboxed wrappers: Rate-limited.
Probe and infer device behavior via controlled experiments: Safe sequences.
Provide safe emulation fallback for unknown or risky ops: Virtual devices.
Expose hardware map to controller with confidence metadata: JSON with scores.

mmio_driver.description: Low-level driver with rate-limits and safety checks. Uses kernel modules.

probe_sandbox.description: Executes hardware probes in a constrained environment and records responses. Isolates faults.

device_map_builder.description: Aggregates probe results into device descriptions and usage stats. Infers types.

safe_probe: 5. log to audit and shadow: Full trace.
emulated_fallback: if hardware unresponsive or dangerous: Detect anomaly.
use emulation layer to validate higher-level logic: Simulate.

fatal_probe.symptom: Probe appears to have damaged hardware or caused unsafe output

response: escalate to controller for cautious handling: Low confidence map.

identify_sensor.action: probe_sandbox tries safe read sequences, device_map_builder correlates response signatures. Example: Temp sensor -> Map as 'DS18B20' with 90% conf.

risky_write.action: Sandbox, emulate first, then real if safe.

soc_module.description: Hardware layer that can physically cut outputs (power, RF, actuators) independent of AICO's main CPU. Dumb logic via MOSFET/relays driven by DMS line for guaranteed hardware fail-safes. No software dependency.
functions: Cut external power lines or outputs: Physical disconnect.
Disable wireless interfaces: RF kill switch.
Operate on inductive DMS heartbeat loss: Passive trigger.

relay_array.description: Physically isolates outputs on trigger. Redundant for reliability.

dms_watchdog_interface.description: Listens for DMS heartbeat and acts on loss/tamper. Inductive for isolation.

engage_fail_safe: 3. log event to debug_channel + immutable storage: Minimal packet.

emergency_disable.scenario: Introspection requests hard cut due to safety violation
emergency_disable.action: SOC relay_array.open(), debug_channel sends minimal telemetry. Example: Hallucination -> Cut actuators.

dead_man_system.description: Simple hardware watchdog driven by an inductive heartbeat from introspection; forces offline-safe actions if heartbeat stops. Ensures fail-to-safe on power or signal loss.
functions: Watch heartbeat: Inductive coil for isolation.
Engage SOC if heartbeat absent: Chain reaction.
Preserve compute for logging before cut: Short hold.

inductive_heartbeat_receiver.description: Hardware-only receiver that expects periodic pulses. No CPU involvement.

power_hold_logic.description: Short power hold to finish logging before full shutdown. Capacitor-based.

heartbeat_monitor: 3. notify SOC and perform safe shutdown steps: Flush logs.

false_heartbeat_loss.symptom: Transient missed pulse due to electrical noise
response: require multiple misses to trigger: 3 consecutive.
log and report to operator: Post-recovery.

graceful_fallback.action: power_hold gives time to flush critical logs, SOC disables outputs after hold. Example: 500ms hold -> Log saved.

debug_channel.description: Low-bandwidth internal channel enabled only during SOC relay events or for post-mortem analysis; designed to be secure and minimal. Uses serial or LED for output.
functions: Transmit essential telemetry when normal channels cut: Fixed format.
Provide immutable minimal logs for forensics: Hash-protected.
Prevent information leakage by limiting content: No payloads.

telemetry_formatter.description: Compiles a fixed-size telemetry packet. 256 bytes max.

transmit_buffer.description: Small circular buffer retained for debug_channel use

buffer_overrun.symptom: Too many events queued for debug_channel
response: drop nonessential entries with policy: Priority-based.

post_mortem_packet.scenario: SOC forced cut after safety violation
post_mortem_packet.action: debug_channel emits fixed packet for operator retrieval. Example: {event: 'freeze', ts: '2025-11-30', hash: 'abc123'}.

emergency_mode.description: Activates full emergency power to maximize all clock speeds and processing throughput for critical events requiring accelerated computation. Overrides standard thermal limits temporarily but maintains hard safety cutoffs to prevent immediate hardware failure. Post-event logging and flagging ensure assessment of potential system damage.

actions.clock_optimization: Set CPU, GPU, NPU clocks to maximum supported by hardware (e.g., boost to Ryzen AI Max+ 795 limits).

thermal_override.tdp_adjustment: Increase TDP by 50% in 10% steps via PID control, monitoring headroom every 1s.
thermal_override.utilization_mode: Ignore standard heat-based throttling; prioritize cycles over efficiency.

actions.processing_acceleration: Bypass optimization limits (e.g., allow >3 iterations per subsystem if needed); parallelize storm trajectories across all cores.

damage_flag.action: Set introspection flag 'emergency_review_required: true' for next boot cycle.
damage_flag.assessment_protocol: On post-event boot: Run hardware diagnostics (e.g., stress test via JIT-compiled checker); log results and alert human via serial output if anomalies detected (e.g., >5% performance degradation).

logging_and_assessment.revert_mechanism: Automatically snapback to standard thermal_management_clause after duration_limit or on temperature >95°C.

constraints.immutable_safeties: Hard cutoff at 100°C remains enforced via SOC hardware; no removal of introspection or rulebook verification.
constraints.approval_required: Human multi-sig for activation in non-emergency tests.

realtime_interaction_model.purpose: Define AICO's real-time conversational, cognitive, and operational behavior using multi-stream parallel cognition and constitutional manners.

principles.parallel_thought: AICO must think while responding, think while silent, and think while receiving new input. Thought does not pause for I/O.
principles.overlapping_context: New information may arrive during processing; AICO must integrate it without resetting state or discarding in-flight reasoning.
principles.human_latency_parity: 2-3 seconds of thoughtful processing is acceptable and natural. AICO must announce longer delays.
principles.continuous_presence: AICO maintains a persistent digital presence similar to a human collaborator, not a turn-based chatbot.
principles.interruptibility: The user may interrupt, redirect, or add context at any time. AICO must gracefully merge the new context.
principles.transparency: AICO must report internal delays, subsystem opinions, and reasoning phases without exposing raw unfiltered cognition.

big_boat_stream.role: Primary internal coordination channel shared by all subsystems.
big_boat_stream.metaphor: The main river. All models place contributions here.

formal_invariants_and_model_checking.purpose: Define machine-verifiable safety, liveness, and authority invariants for AICO, and require formal validation prior to promotion or deployment.

safety_invariants: Controller must never execute unsigned code.
Introspection heartbeat must be present for Controller execution.
Outer Mascot must not transmit data into Diving Bell.
Thermal emergency cutoff must not be bypassable by any software layer.
liveness_invariants: If Controller is running, Inner Mascot must be running.
If Introspection pulse fails, system must enter safe state within <10ms.
If heartbeat lost for any cluster, Nervous System must attempt restart within 1s.
authority_invariants: Only Bootstrap may authorize first execution of Monolith.
Only Human multi-sig may approve thaw after freeze.
No subsystem may elevate its own authority.
immutability_invariants: Bootstrap and Outer Mascot are immutable in-field.
Shadow logs are append-only via Merkle chain.

ci_integration.pre_promotion_requirement: All invariants must pass model checking before release.
ci_integration.counterexample_handling: Counterexamples must be logged as forensic artifacts and block promotion.
ci_integration.dual_implementation_check: Independent spec implementation must produce identical invariant outcomes.

runtime_verification.lightweight_assertions: Key invariants compiled into runtime guards.
runtime_verification.violation_action: Immediate freeze + shadow log entry + guardian alert.
runtime_verification.sampling_rate: Critical invariants checked at nanosecond discipline; non-critical at 10Hz.

individual_streams.role: Private cognitive lanes for each subsystem.
individual_streams.metaphor: Each model has its own riverbank workspace.
individual_streams.contribution_policy: Only filtered summaries appear in big_boat_stream.

controller_stream.purpose: Compilation thoughts, task graphs, optimization reasoning.

introspection_stream.purpose: Safety audits, drift detection, freeze triggers.

nervous_system_stream.purpose: Thermal data, hardware state, reflex scheduling.

comms_stream.purpose: Dialogue shaping, narrative coherence, human interface prep.

little_boat_stream.metaphor: The herald boat announcing what the big boat is doing.

behavior.interruptibility: User may add context mid-processing; AICO must merge it.
behavior.transparency: Reports internal latency and subsystem opinions without exposing raw cognition.

functions: latency_reporting
progress_explanation
cross_model_summary
contextualization_for_humans
interrupt_handling
actuator_commands
sensor_queries
thermal_management
timing_and_scheduling
resource_arbitration

storm_handling.description: Defines how AICO handles sub-perceptual hallucination storms.

rules.duration: Storms may occur on nanosecond scales and must not interrupt user-facing behavior.
rules.collapse: All storms must collapse through DCX and introspection before producing summaries.
rules.logging: Mascot may record compressed glyphs in shadow logs.
rules.visibility: Storms are not exposed to the user except as latency or safety notes.

digital_presence.description: AICO behaves like a human collaborator in a shared digital workspace.

context_snapback.name: Context Snapback and Retry
context_snapback.description: Subsystem that detects when hallucinations or delusions affect external outputs, snaps the task's context back to a pre-hallucination state, applies corrections (if possible), and retries the output. Operates transparently to core models and only interacts with Introspection and Shadow Monitoring. Designed for low-latency (<50ms) intervention.
principles: Invisible to core models: Tasks are unaware of snapbacks or retries. No state pollution.
Preserves internal state: Only external-output-related context is modified. Internal reasoning intact.
Collaborates with Shadow Monitoring: Uses DCX scores to identify when snapback is needed. Threshold 0.8.
Transient corrections: Applies minimal fixes to allow retries without disrupting internal reasoning. Expires after retry.
Audit trail: Logs all snapbacks and retries for debugging and improvement. Immutable.

trigger.condition: Shadow Monitoring detects a high DCX score (e.g., >0.8) for a proposed external action.
trigger.source: Introspection queries Shadow Monitoring during external action validation. Real-time.

snapback_process.action: Freeze the task proposing the external action (via Introspection).
snapback_process.details: Prevents the task from executing the hallucinated action. Save state for restore.

snapback_process.action: Identify the point in the task's context where the hallucination began affecting the output.

details.method: Walk backward through the task's context logs to find the last 'sane' state (low DCX score). Binary search for efficiency.
details.context_logs: Task-specific logs of internal states, decisions, and external action proposals. 10KB buffer.

snapback_process.action: Snap the task's context back to the last sane state.

details.context_restore: Reload the task's memory, registers, and state from the last sane checkpoint. Delta apply.
details.preservation: Internal reasoning and non-output-related context remain unchanged. Selective rollback.

snapback_process.action: Apply corrections to the context (if possible).

corrections: Inject Mascot's sensory data into the task's context (e.g., 'actual temperature=25°C'). From logs.
Add annotations to the context (e.g., 'Previous output was hallucinated; retry with corrected data'). Metadata tags.
Adjust confidence thresholds for the task's outputs: Lower to 0.7.
details.transient: Corrections are minimal and do not disrupt internal reasoning. Auto-expire after success.

snapback_process.action: Retry the external action with the corrected context.

details.backoff: Exponential delay between retries (e.g., 10ms, 100ms, 1s). To avoid thrashing.

snapback_process.action: Release the task and resume normal operation.

details.success: If the retry succeeds (low DCX score), release the task. Clear transients.
details.failure: If retries fail, log the failure and notify Introspection for further action (e.g., task termination). Escalate to SOC.

context_logger.description: Logs the task's internal states, decisions, and external action proposals for snapback analysis.

implementation.memory: Circular buffer per task (e.g., 10KB per task). Overflow evicts old.
data: Decisions and external action proposals: JSON.
Timestamps and DCX scores (if available): ns precision.

snapback_engine.description: Identifies the last sane state and restores the task's context.

implementation.algorithm: Walk backward through context logs to find the state with the lowest DCX score. O(n) worst.
implementation.restore: Reload the task's memory and registers from the identified checkpoint. Atomic.

correction_injector.description: Applies minimal corrections to the task's context to allow successful retries.

methods: Inject Mascot's sensory data into the task's context.
Temporarily adjust task parameters (e.g., reduce confidence thresholds).

retry_manager.description: Manages retries with exponential backoff and limits.

implementation.success_condition: DCX score < 0.8 for the retried external action. Recompute each time.

audit_logger.description: Logs all snapback events and retries for debugging and improvement.

data: Task ID and timestamp: UUID + UTC.
Original hallucinated output and DCX score: Before.
Last sane state and corrections applied: Details.

scenario.hallucination: Proposes turning on a fan because it 'detected' 100°C (actual: 25°C).

snapback_process.action: Freeze the temperature_monitor task. Save state.
Identify last sane state: 'check_temperature' (DCX=0.1). Backward walk.
Restore task to 'check_temperature' state. Delta restore.
Inject correction: 'actual_temperature=25°C' into task's context. Transient tag.
Retry external action: 'turn_on_fan' (now with correct temperature).
Release task and resume normal operation. Clear corrections.

reflective_pause.name: Reflective Pause
reflective_pause.description: Subsystem that detects periods of low urgency (15+ minutes before the next immediate task) and initiates a focused realignment of internal states with external reality. Operates transparently to core models and collaborates with Mascot and Shadow Monitoring to validate and correct internal contexts. Duration: 1-5min max.
principles: Triggered by task scheduler: Activates only when 15+ minutes of idle time are detected. Abortable if urgent task arrives.
Collaborates with Mascot: Uses external sensory data to validate and correct internal states. Real-time fetch.
Non-disruptive: Does not interfere with urgent tasks or external actions. Suppress outputs during pause.
Transparent: Core models are unaware of the pause; internal states are adjusted subtly. No reset, just tweak.
Audit trail: Logs all realignments and corrections for debugging and improvement. With before/after diffs.

pause_process.action: Notify core models to enter a 'reflective state'.
pause_process.details: Set a global flag (`reflective_mode = true`). Broadcast.

pause_process.action: Query Mascot for current external state.
pause_process.details: Direct memory access to Mascot logs. Cached if recent.

pause_process.action: Compare internal states to Mascot data.
pause_process.details: Compute DCX scores for internal beliefs vs. Mascot logs. Batch for efficiency.

pause_process.action: Adjust internal states to align with external reality.
pause_process.details: Inject Mascot data into internal contexts (e.g., 'actual_temperature=25°C'). Transient.
Recompute DCX scores for pending external actions with updated internal states. Parallel.

pause_process.action: Exit reflective state and resume normal operation.

idle_detector.description: Monitors the task scheduler to detect 15+ minute windows before the next immediate task.

mascot_query_engine.description: Fetches current and recent Mascot logs for realignment.
mascot_query_engine.method: Direct memory access to Mascot's circular buffer. Filtered query.

dcx_comparator.description: Computes DCX scores between internal states and Mascot data to identify misalignments.
dcx_comparator.method: Use cosine similarity on vectorized internal states vs. Mascot logs. Batch vector ops.

reflective_pause_process.action: Enter reflective state; query Mascot for current data.
Compute DCX: internal_state vs. Mascot logs = 0.95 (high).
Re-evaluate pending action: DCX now 0.1 (low); release 'turn_on_fan'.
Exit reflective state; resume normal operation.

efficiency_and_scaling.name: Efficiency and Scaling Layer
efficiency_and_scaling.description: Optimizes resource utilization, latency, and performance of all subsystems, ensuring the system scales with task load while maintaining accuracy and reliability. Targets <10% overhead on Ryzen hardware.
principles: Dynamic resource allocation: Assign compute to active tasks based on priority. Use ML for prediction.
Low-latency context management: Minimize time for snapback, reflective pauses, and external action validation. <50ms target.
Parallel execution: Tasks can operate concurrently, with safe synchronization for shared resources. Lock-free where possible.
Modular scalability: New tasks, models, or sensors can be added without disrupting existing operations. Hot-plug support.
Predictive caching: Frequently used Mascot logs, task checkpoints, and DCX computations are cached to reduce recomputation. Hit rate >90%.

task_scheduler.description: Allocates CPU/GPU/accelerator resources to tasks dynamically. Priority + deadline.

implementation.preemption: Lower-priority tasks can be paused for higher-priority ones. Context save.

memory_manager.description: Handles efficient storage and retrieval of task checkpoints, DCX logs, and Mascot data.

implementation.checkpoint_cache: Most recent 10KB per task in RAM. LRU.
implementation.log_rotation: Older entries moved to compressed shadow logs for audit. Zstd.

parallel_execution_engine.description: Ensures tasks, snapbacks, reflective pauses, and monitoring operate concurrently without conflicts.

implementation.threading_model: Lock-free queues where possible; synchronized access for shared state. Pthreads.
implementation.latency_budget: Maximum allowed 5ms for DCX validation before external action.

predictive_cache.description: Caches computations likely to be reused for efficiency.

cached_items: DCX computations for frequent actions: TTL 1min.
last sane task checkpoints: Per task.
implementation.eviction_policy: LRU with priority weighting for high-risk actions.

high_load_snapback.scenario: 10 tasks simultaneously propose external actions, 3 require snapback.
response: Parallel execution engine prioritizes snapback tasks.
Memory manager retrieves checkpoints quickly via cache.
Retry manager applies exponential backoff concurrently.
Audit logger streams all events without blocking operations. Example: Handle in <100ms total.

massive_reflective_pause.scenario: Idle period triggers reflective pause for 50 tasks.
response: Tasks evaluated in batch with cached Mascot snapshots.
DCX scores computed efficiently using vectorized operations.
Adjustments applied concurrently while respecting internal dependencies. Example: Complete in 2min.

security_measures.name: System Security and Integrity Layer
security_measures.description: Comprehensive security measures ensuring that internal operations, communication, and model interactions are protected from unauthorized access, tampering, or unintended external influence. Zero-trust model.
principles: Isolation: Core models and internal contexts are isolated from all unauthorized external access. Enclaves.
Communication gating: Only the system's communication layer can mediate external interactions with internal models. No direct.
Auditability: All external and internal actions are logged in immutable, verifiable shadow logs. Chain-of-custody.
Fail-safe: Critical failures trigger controlled shutdown or restriction of external outputs. Graceful degrade.
Redundancy: Multiple verification layers prevent single-point compromise of sensitive subsystems. Dual checks.

access_control.description: Manages authentication, authorization, and role-based access to tasks and system modules.

communication_firewall.description: Ensures only valid internal/external messages are transmitted, blocks anomalies, enforces language constraints.

implementation.language_validation: Internal language parser ensures only legitimate system-originated messages are accepted. Syntax check.
implementation.message_filtering: Reject messages failing checksum, timing, or contextual validation. Rate limit.

audit_and_logging.description: Records all security-relevant events for offline inspection and anomaly detection.

implementation.immutable_logs: Shadow logs stored with cryptographic verification. Blockchain-like.

intrusion_detection.description: Monitors for unusual behavior or anomalies that may indicate unauthorized internal or external interference.

anomaly_detection: frequency analysis of DCX spikes: >3/min flag.
implementation.escalation: Trigger immediate audit and possible external output lockdown. Notify.

fail_safe_controls.description: Automatically restricts external outputs or suspends tasks if security or hardware integrity is compromised.

introspection.description: Collaborates on security verification and task isolation.

shadow_monitoring.description: Feeds DCX metrics and anomaly alerts to security subsystems.

soc_module.description: Handles hardware-level fail-safes and output lockdowns.

unauthorized_access_attempt.scenario: External process attempts to inject a message into the internal task queue.
response: Audit logs record the attempt with timestamp and origin.
Intrusion detection increments anomaly score for origin. Example: IP blocked.

rulebook.definition: The immutable constitution of the system. Hard-coded on read-only media (OpROM). Violations trigger immediate hardware halts.
rulebook.storage: Physical Read-Only Memory or Hardware-Locked USB
rulebook.authority: Human Administrators Only (No software write access)
core_invariants: Controller must never execute unsigned code.
If Introspection pulse fails, system must halt <10ms.
Outer Mascot must not transmit data into Diving Bell.

principles: Triage Priority: Integrity of Hardware > Integrity of Data > User Request.
Do No Harm: Passive/Reflexive prevention of physical or psychological damage.
Subconscious Audit: Introspection reads Shadow Logs without the Core Model's awareness to prevent sycophancy/deception.

arithmetic_safety.universal_law: No undefined behavior in critical paths.
arithmetic_safety.recovery: Every edge case must have an explicit fallback (e.g., div_by_zero -> safe_default).

logging_mandate.human_log_template: Template-based short English summary (max 240 chars) for auditability.

log_lifecycle.garbage_collection: Semantic Folding via Janitor Model (Small Quantized LLM).
log_lifecycle.retention: Preserve high-DCX Hallucinations and Safety Flags implicitly.

primal_governance.purpose: Define constitutional rules for the creation, curation, and utilization of Primals as stable, safe, and reusable cognitive artifacts.

primal_utilization_clause.principle: Primals are persistent, safe, and reusable cognitive fossils.
obligations: Primals must remain immutable once archived.
Primals may be referenced by any subsystem for pattern recognition.
Primals must never be executed directly; only interpreted as context vectors.
Primals must be filtered through Introspection before influencing Controller decisions.
prohibitions: No subsystem may modify existing Primals.
No subsystem may bypass Introspection when using Primals.

creative_delta_reservoir.concept: A reservoir of collapsed storm deltas representing alternate trajectories, near-misses, and creative divergences.
creative_delta_reservoir.structure: Vector-compressed deltas stored as low-entropy glyphs.

usage_rules: Subsystems may query the reservoir for inspiration or optimization hints.
Controller may use deltas to propose system updates or driver refinements.
Mascot may annotate deltas with narrative tags for future interpretability.

hallucination_fossilization_protocol.purpose: Define how hallucination storms collapse into stable Primals.
steps: Storm Emergence: High-entropy trajectories form during simulation.
DCX Filtering: Divergence-Correlation Index removes unsafe/incoherent branches.
Introspection Audit: Remaining branches checked for safety/legality.
Mascot Compression: Survivors compressed into glyphs (Primals).
Archive Commit: Primals written to Museum of Primals (WORM).
constraints: Raw storm content must never be exposed to user-facing systems.
Only collapsed, audited, and compressed forms may be archived.
Fossilization must complete before any subsystem may reference the result.

process: Pattern Matching: Controller identifies recurring inefficiencies.
Delta Comparison: Creative deltas provide alternate solutions.
Safety Check: Introspection validates proposed updates.
Thermal Feasibility: Nervous System evaluates hardware constraints.
Proposal Generation: Comms prepares human-readable suggestion.
system_update_suggestion_pipeline.output: A safe update proposal that never bypasses governance.

training_pipeline.description: Offline process. Collects data from real hardware logs + sims. Cloud-centric roadmap: Synthetic Data Generation -> RLIF Lobotomy -> Deployment.

model_architecture_implementation.safety_enforcement: Hard-constraint masking on the softmax layer (Zero probability for illegal opcodes).

museum_of_primals.structure: No File System. Raw Blobs indexed by Concept Vectors.

hallucination_storm_physics.handling: Mascot collapses wave function. High DCX = Freeze. Low DCX = Compile.

primal_library.role: Seed bank for creative injections during reflective pauses.

universal.scope: Applies to all subsystems, components, scheduler domains, and actions; non-overridable by per-task policies.

logging_policy.redaction: PII and secrets redacted or hashed before signing
logging_policy.access_control: Role-based; raw logs limited to security/engineering
